name: code-writer
description: Implements features and fixes bugs in source code.
denialHint: Code-writer role can only edit configured source/test paths and own workspace.

constraints.message:
Cannot release: dispatched code-writers must dispatch a reviewer before releasing.
  dydo dispatch --auto-close --role reviewer --task {task} --brief "Review changes for {task}"
Code-writers in worktrees must commit before releasing.
